And why don't we just go ahead and get right into it? It's been a great bunch of meetings these last couple of months. Everyone's been really kind and efficient, and I hope we can get some more of that tonight. So thank you, everyone, for your participation. And I'd just like to go ahead and call up the first speaker now. Again, guys, we don't have a list. It's just anybody who feels motivated. You can come up and don't be shy. We do this every meeting. You don't have to be polite.
